CustomField.description: We calculate the days at the current stage.
CustomField.formula:
/*We want to calculate the days of the current stage*/
CASE ( fxOrderPath__c ,
"Processing Hold", TODAY() - Actual_Order_Date__c ,
"Order Clear", TODAY() - Actual_Order_Date__c ,
"Mfg Date Committed", Current_Global_Delivery_Date__c - TODAY(),
"Ready for Shipping", TODAY() - Actual_Global_Delivery_Date__c ,
"Order Shipped", Actual_Global_Delivery_Date__c - Actual_Order_Date__c ,
/*ELSE*/ Actual_Global_Delivery_Date__c - Actual_Order_Date__c )
CustomField.label: Days In Stage
